name: CodiMD
tagline: Realtime collaborative Markdown notes on all platforms. GitHub: https://github.com/hackmdio/codimd
description:
Realtime collaborative Markdown notes on all platforms. GitHub: https://github.com/hackmdio/codimd


_Template derived from caprover/one-click-apps (caprover@bd357c9, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  codimd-mariadb:
    image: linuxserver/mariadb:110.4.14mariabionic-ls77
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: c9b6bf42f1524393
      MYSQL_DATABASE: codimd
      MYSQL_USER: codimd
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: c9b6bf42f1524393
      PGID: 1000
      PUID: 1000
      TZ: Europe/London
    volumes:
      - codimd-mariadb-config:/config
    restart: unless-stopped
  codimd:
    environment:
      DB_HOST: codimd-mariadb
      DB_USER: codimd
      DB_PASS: c9b6bf42f1524393
      DB_NAME: codimd
      DB_PORT: 3306
      PGID: 1000
      PUID: 1000
      TZ: Europe/London
    image: linuxserver/codimd:1.6.0-ls44
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - codimd-config:/config
    ports:
      - 42017:3000
volumes:
  codimd-mariadb-config: null
  codimd-config: null
